17.kj: confusion, empty place, without form, nothing, (thing of) nought, vain, vanity, waste, wilderness.
17.dv: from an unused root meaning to lie waste;

17.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
17.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

19.gl: to pour out, especially a libation, or to cast (metal); by analogy, to anoint aking
